epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview:
Hi BGV.
I’m keen to share something that has been incredibly valuable to Day2. Given what we discussed on Friday about “Origin stories” I w
It makes me a lot older than you !
Morning! Remind me of logistics - are you coming home with Max in taxi from Cheltenham? Xx
Urgh… I feel a bit sick at the thought of it!!

tasks.text: Brian. Book meeting Prep for Caroline
Get testimonial quote from CEO of Parkinson's UK (on-on-one in two weeks).

weather.narrative: Wet day ahead. Boots and a proper coat.
